title: Lead Magnet Markdown Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for every lead magnet markdown source file in projects/002-stan-store-lawfirm-funnel/content/lead-magnets/. Drives PPTX generation, landing page props, and the vanity redirect map.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier. Matches the markdown filename and the resource landing page filename.

title.description: Human-readable title displayed on the landing page hero and in SEO meta.

subtitle.description: 1-2 sentence description displayed under the title and in meta description.

bullets.description: Value bullets shown on the landing page. Each is a single-line description of what the reader gets.

vanity_slug.description: Short slug used on buildmytribe.ai. Must match an entry in the vanity-redirect-map.json.

source.description: Optional: research source or attribution line displayed in the PPTX.

voice_calibration.description: Reference to an existing magnet whose voice was used as the style target. Toughlove uses this to verify voice consistency.

page_count.description: Target slide count for the PPTX. Most magnets: 4-8. One-pagers: 1-2.

category.description: High-level category for the /resources hub index grouping.

created.description: YYYY-MM-DD date the magnet was authored.

examples.title: AI Demand Letter Tool Comparison Matrix + ROI Calculator
examples.subtitle: Side-by-side comparison of 4 AI demand letter tools, with a plug-in ROI calculator for your firm's case volume.
bullets: 4-tool matrix: EvenUp, Tavrn, Filevine DemandsAI, Supio — scored on cost, speed, integrations
Editable ROI calculator: enter your case volume, see first-year savings
Red flags to watch for in every demand-letter AI demo
Decision tree: which tool fits your firm size and case mix
examples.source: EvenUp Series E (Fortune 2026), Harvard Law AI Productivity Study 2025, Tavrn and Filevine product specs
